_comment: Copy this file to config.json (gitignored) and fill in your keys. NVIDIA powers text/diagram/chart reasoning (GLM); Gemini powers photo generation. Charts and equations work with NO keys at all.

nvidia._reviewModel_hint: Optional. GLM-5.2 is a slow reasoner; set a fast instruct model here for the whole-lecture review pass, e.g. 'meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct'. Empty = use textModel.
